description: TinaCMS is a Git-backed headless CMS for managing Markdown, MDX, JSON, and similar file-based content. It can be self-hosted or used with the managed TinaCloud service for hosted editing and content infrastructure.
summary: tina.io exposes a GraphQL content API and a Node-based CLI; the docs confirm both surfaces but the publicly scraped pages did not reveal a concrete hosted API endpoint or definitive authentication mechanics.
